reviews.review_description: I'm a college librarian and I think that this app is amazing. It feels just like being in the library and it is very cool that you can pick the books up off the shelves, see a link through to the library catalogue, and sometimes even read the book on Google books. This is a great app for anyone who loves libraries, browsing shelves, and exploring a really awesome building.

Realy good game but the only bad thing is for short people there are no ladders to use or anything to get the higher books and also all of the books are just Christian add more kid books comedy anime different kinds of books not just Christian

I thought there wasn't much you could do in this library but take a look at the display cases that are around the library. Boy was I wrong. If you like books then this is the app for you. Every book that I looked at I could actually take out of the shelves and look at its cover. You then can find information about the book that is in the library. I am floored at the work that must have gone in to create this virtual library. The display cases have good information and you have the ability to see the artifacts outside of the case.
